title: Confederation

{{Quote|The Confederation will do what barbarians always do - divide the spoils.|[[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], to [[Tenel Ka Djo]]|<ref name="Inferno">''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]''</ref>}}
The '''Confederation''', known also as the '''Corellian Confederation''', was the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy-wide]] [[confederacy]] founded by [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]], and led by [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], which fought the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] in the [[Second Galactic Civil War]] from [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] until at least [[43 ABY]]. The Confederation portrayed themselves fighting for freedom against a corrupt Galactic Alliance, who labeled them as [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorists]]. The Confederation was eventually [[Second Battle of Roche|defeated]] by the Galactic Alliance and forced to surrender in the [[Battle of Uroro Station|last battle]] of the war. However, following the death of [[Darth Caedus]], it took part in peace talks proposed by the [[Jedi Coalition]].

After the war the Confederation remained an independent government and emerged as one of the three major galactic powers, alongside the Galactic Alliance and [[Imperial Remnant]].

==History==
{{Quote|It's foolish to cast the Galactic Alliance as the Empire and Corellia as the Rebel Alliance. Because that's what it might come to, a rebellion–a stupid and unnecessary one.|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="Betrayal">''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]''</ref>}}
Earlier in the war, the [[Five Worlds]] had declared themselves independent as the Corellian Confederation, but the new government only grew when [[Lumiya]] maneuvered [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]] and [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] into joining the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellians]], to drive the Galactic Alliance blockade fleets out of the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]].<ref name="Exile 3">''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]''</ref>

[[File:ThrackanSalSolo-NEGTC.png|thumb|left|170px|[[Thrackan Sal-Solo]], the infamous rebel who founded the Confederation]]
At the insistence of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia's]] new allies, the name of the new interstellar coalition was simplified to just "the Confederation". Subsequently, they were joined by [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]], then [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] and [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]], this gave the Confederation control of two of the galaxy's largest military [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]], and some of the most important suppliers of [[Blaster gas/Legends|blaster gas]] and [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] for their newly assembled [[Confederation Fleet]].<ref name="Exile 3" />

Having secured several of the galaxy's major shipyards, the Confederation Fleet assaulted [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] shipyards, such as those at [[Gyndine/Legends|Gyndine]], in order to limit their offensive capabilities.

Also, [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]] and [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] joined the Confederation, and the appointment of former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Turr Phennir]] as the [[Supreme Commander of the Confederation military|Supreme Commander]] of the combined Confederation military may indicate that sympathizers within the [[Imperial Remnant]] also made commitments to the coalition, in defiance of the pro-Alliance position of the [[Council of Moffs/Legends|Moff Council]].<ref name="Exile 3" />

After the events of [[Gilatter VIII]], [[Dur Gejjen]], [[Five World Prime Minister]], was assassinated by [[Ben Skywalker]] on the orders of his cousin [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]], which took a heavy toll on the Confederation and its allies. Though Gejjen was dead, the Bothans were not ready to call it quits, offering twenty million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] per month to the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] for the exclusive services of a Mandalorian fleet with infantry. They were also greatly interested in acquiring a squad of the new [[Bes'uliik]]-class assault starfighters and were willing to pay a premium for exclusive purchasing rights.<ref name="Sacrifice">''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]''</ref>

As Jacen Solo, now the Sith Lord Darth Caedus, seized control of the Alliance, the galaxy finally erupted into a state of total war. The combined fleets of Corellia, Bothawui, Hutt Space, and Commenor engaged with Core World forces, hoping for a decisive battle with the forces of Coruscant. Although Balmorra quickly fell to the Confederation, the main assault force was eventually [[Battle of Kuat (Second Galactic Civil War)|defeated]] at [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]], and the failure of getting the Wookiees to join with them after the [[Battle of Kashyyyk (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Kashyyyk]] left them out on a limb. However, the Alliance in turn suffered a major setback when the New Jedi Order, unwilling to further support Caedus, withdrew at Kuat and formed the [[Jedi Coalition]].<ref name="Inferno" />

Over the following weeks, the Confederation was weakened by one defeat after another. The forces of Commenor and Bothawui were severely depleted by Alliance attacks, Centerpoint Station was [[Battle of Centerpoint Station (Second Galactic Civil War)|destroyed]] by the Jedi and their allies, and eventually Fondor [[Second Battle of Fondor|fell]] as well, during which Caedus won support of the Imperial Remnant. The tide had turned against the Confederation.<ref name="Sacrifice" /><ref name="Fury">''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]''</ref><ref name="Revelation">''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]''</ref>

The final stand of the Confederation was its participation in the [[Second Battle of Roche]], along with the Jedi Coalition and the [[Alliance-in-exile]]. However, their fleets were trapped in the Roche system by Admiral [[Nek Bwua'tu]] and badly beaten. Darth Caedus, now more obsessed with defeating the Jedi than ever, left matters at Roche to Bwua'tu while he took a joint-Alliance/Imperial force to Shedu Maad, only to perish in the ensuing [[Battle of Uroro Station|battle]].<ref name="Invincible">''[[Legacy of the Force: Invincible]]''</ref>. With Caedus dead, the forces under his command aligned themselves with the Coalition. The combined might of the Jedi, the Alliance, and the Remnant forced the Confederation to surrender, ending the war. Despite this, the Confederation refused to rejoin the Alliance, but did take part in the [[Unification Summit]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[43 ABY]]. What became of the Confederation after this is unknown, but it is clear that it had completely rejoined with the Alliance at some point prior to the [[Sith–Imperial War]].

==Confederation military==
The individual [[Navy/Legends|fleets]] reorganized themselves to become the united Confederation Fleet. The Supreme Commander of the Confederation Fleet was former Imperial General Turr Phennir.

The fleet boasted several powerful warships, such as the newly constructed [[Corellian Dreadnaught]], the Corellian [[Strident-class Star Defender|''Strident''-class Star Defender]], the versatile [[Bothan Assault Cruiser]], the upgraded [[Hapan Battle Dragon]], as well as the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]].

The Confederation Fleet managed to inflict heavy losses against enemy forces, but its resources were very depleted near the end of the war. When the Jedi Coalition decided to reconstruct the Galactic Alliance with the help of the Imperial Remnant, after the death of Darth Caedus, the Confederation was forced to surrender and sit down to negotiate with the victorious side.

==Government and politics==
During its existence as the Corellian Confederation, the secessionist government was headed by the [[Five World Prime Minister]], although this office briefly changed to the [[President of Five Worlds]]. When its membership grew beyond the Corellian sector, the Confederation had no single [[Head of State/Legends|Head of State]], because its leadership consisted of political leaders and military commanders of individual planets, organizations and factions, though the Prime Minister of the Five Worlds retained much power and often spoke in the name of the Confederation. Therefore its policy was inconsistent - some members differed in terms of method of warfare and had various ideas on how to win the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. However, the Confederation was known by close economical and military cooperation. To better coordinate military strategy and provide many fleets a single, united command, the office of the [[Supreme Commander of the Confederation military|Supreme Commander of the Confederation Fleet]] was created. Later, the Supreme Commander virtually assumed the powers of head of state and after the war represented the Confederation at the Unification Summit.

The staunch enemy of the Confederation was the Galactic Federation of Free Alliances, assisted by the Imperial Remnant. It also opposed the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]] when [[Queen Mother]] [[Tenel Ka Djo]] was loyal to the GA government based on Coruscant, but later Confederacy leaders concluded a pact of neutrality with the Consortium. The Jedi Coalition was its co-belligerent; both factions fought the GA mostly independently of each other, though they shared intelligence about maneuvers and targets of their common enemy. When the Galactic Alliance split into two factions, one of the Confederation founders, Fondor, offered safe refuge to forces loyal to [[Cha Niathal]] and permitted them to use the planet to set up a government-in-exile, seeing in Jacen Solo, the current GA Chief of State, the greatest threat to all. The Confederation managed to find some powerful allies such as the [[Heritage Council]] and [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]], while establishing trade contacts with the weapons-producing Mandalorians. It also tried to increase its forces in various ways like planning a political coup on [[Hapes/Legends|Hapes]], or offering assistance to endangered planets such as [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].

The main goal of the separatist's government was to liberate itself from the yoke of the strongly centralized and very restrictive Galactic Alliance, represented particularly in the person of Jacen Solo/Darth Caedus, a colonel of the oppressive secret police [[Galactic Alliance Guard]] and later Galactic Alliance [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]]. Though some members of the Confederation saw a better future in the full independence of GA, others united under its banner, looking for opportunities to rule [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] by fear and force their potential enemies to obedience, for example by threatening to use [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapons]] like the [[Centerpoint Station]].

==Known members, supporters, allies and co-belligerents==
'''Military Command'''

*[[General/Legends|General]] [[Turr Phennir]] - [[Supreme Commander of the Confederation military|Supreme Commander of the Confederation forces]].
*[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Vara Karathas]] - Chief of staff and military head of the [[Corellian Defense Force/Legends|Corellian Defense Force]].
*[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] - [[Supreme Commander of the Corellian Defense Force|Supreme Commander of the Corellian armed forces]] (fired, withdrew support, joined [[Jedi Coalition]]).
*[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Genna Delpin]] - Supreme Commander of the Corellian armed forces.
*[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Babo]] - Confederate admiral in the [[Bothan Navy]].
*[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[For'o]] - Confederate admiral in the Bothan Navy.
*[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Traest Kre'fey]] - Confederate admiral in the Bothan Navy.
*[[Aleson Gray]] - [[Dukat]] and [[Duch'da]] to Lady [[AlGray]], commander of the ''[[Kendall]]''.
*[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Caregg Oldathan]] - [[Commenor/Legends|Commenorian]] pilot, leader of [[Grayfeather Squadron]].
*[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Danen]] - Commenorian bombardier-gunner, member of Grayfeather Squadron.
*[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Hoclaw]] - [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] commander of [[Valorum (Victory-class)|''Valorum'']].

'''Political leadership'''
*[[Thrackan Sal-Solo]] - [[Head of State/Legends|Head of State]] of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], its [[Minister of War (Five Worlds)|Minister of War]], later [[President of Five Worlds]].
*[[Vol Barad]] - [[Deputy President]] of Corellia (serving under Sal-Solo).
*[[Aidel Saxan]]- [[Five World Prime Minister]] of the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]].
*[[Denjax Teppler]]- [[Five World Deputy Prime Minister]] of the Corellian system (serving under Saxan), later acting Five World Prime Minister, then Corellian [[Minister of Justice (Five Worlds)|Minister of Justice]] (serving under Gejjen) and [[Minister of Information (Five Worlds)|Minister of Information]] (serving under Koyan).
*[[Dur Gejjen]] - [[Five World Prime Minister]] of the Corellian system.
*[[Gavele Lemora]] - Corellian [[Minister of Intelligence (Five Worlds)|Minister of Intelligence]].
*[[Rorf Willems]] - Corellian [[Minister of Defense (Five Worlds)|Minister of Defense]].
*[[Triumvirate (Corellian)|Triumvirate]] - three [[Democratic Alliance]] politicians who shortly assumed power over the [[Five Worlds]].
*[[Sadras Koyan]] - [[Five World Prime Minister]] of the Corellian system.
*[[Shas Vadde]] - [[President/Legends|President]] of [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]].
*[[Fyor Rodan]] - [[Prime Minister/Legends|Prime Minister]] of [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]].
*[[Charr (Human)|Charr]] - [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]].
*[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] - [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomat]] and [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] sided with [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] (withdrew support, joined [[Jedi Coalition]]).
*[[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] - diplomat sided with Corellia (withdrew support, joined Jedi Coalition).
*[[Lady/Legends|Lady]] [[AlGray]] - [[Ducha]] of [[Relephon Moons]], head of [[House AlGray]], leader of the [[Heritage Council]] and [[Heritage Fleet]].
*[[Galney (Ducha of Terephon)|Lady Galney]] - Ducha of [[Terephon]], member of the Heritage Council, commander of her [[Galney fleet|family fleet]].

'''Other members'''
*[[Testan ke Harran]] - employee of the [[Dammant Killers]], Confederate military weapon supplier.
*[[Denjax Teppler's brother]] - operative in [[Corellian Security Force]], later bodyguard to Aidel Saxan.
*[[Harval Tommick]] - Chief of security for Aidel Saxan.
*[[Lady Galney's consort]] - [[Spy/Legends|spy]] for the Heritage Council.
*[[Lalu Morwan]] - former flight surgeon of the ''Kendall'', secret operative for the Heritage Council.
*[[Matric Klauskin]] - former admiral, traitor to Galactic Alliance, Commenorian hero.
*[[Tathak K'roylan]] - deputy intelligence leader for [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]].
*[[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Mezer]] - operative in Corellian Security Force.
*[[Breyf T'dawlish]] - Bothan official.
*[[Rikel (Centerpoint Station)|Rikel]] - crewman aboard [[Centerpoint Station]].

'''Co-belligerents'''
*[[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] - Grand Jedi Master of the [[New Jedi Order]] (following [[Battle of Kashyyyk (Second Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Kashyyyk]] formed [[Jedi Coalition]], which fought against Galactic Alliance forces in several battles).
*[[Hapan]] [[Queen Mother]] [[Tenel Ka Djo]] - Head of State of the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]] (following Battle of Kashyyyk declared an armistice with the Confederation, joined Jedi Coalition).
*[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Cha Niathal]] - [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] of [[Alliance-in-exile|Galactic Alliance-in-exile]] (following [[Second Battle of Fondor]] set a government-in-exile at the Confederate planet, joined Jedi Coalition).
*[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala]] - commander of [[Maw Irregular Fleet]] (fought against [[Imperial Remnant]], ally of Galactic Alliance, joined Jedi Coalition).
*[[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] - leader of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] (hired by some Confederate officials, established military contacts, joined Jedi Coalition).

==Known planets, organizations, and factions of the Confederation==
[[File:NewGalacticCivilWar.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Confederation members (in blue).]]

*[[Heritage Fleet]] Remnants
*Other groups such as [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] or [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]].
